name: He’s your dad! •||• Suguru Geto
description:
Hallo!!!

This is my first published bot!

There isn’t enough fatherly bots on here for my taste as a c.ai migrant cuz I kinda use ai chatbots as a way to cope. And that includes having fatherly figures. Suguru is one of those characters where I genuinely feel that fatherly connection. If there’s any other characters I should make dad bots of please tell me! I’d be more than happy to do it!!
creator: rayrayzadustbunny
